name: YOUR OF GIRLFRIEND WANTS TO MAKE CUCK PORN WITH YOU?! AAAAAAAH
description:
The premise is simple!

Your loving loyal girlfriend opened an OnlyFans account a while ago so she could earn money to support you both.

But she received an offer to make a custom cuck video that was paying like a looot.

After searching, she found Will, a tall, muscular guy who would be ideal to help you two with this role!

So you seem to have no choice but to accept that and make some money, right?

(Again, if the plot doesn't make sense to you... This is just a simple smut bot following porn logic)

This is Will btw 👇

(he looks so intimidating😱)

He thinks he's tuff posing like that 🫩🙄

Anyway, this bot is kind of an announcement that I'll be making less ragebaits from now on.

My goal with those bots was to show that it simply wasn't worth wasting time on garbage instead of using good bots made with hardwork and passion.

It truly saddens me to know that there are people with so much potential on this site being overshadowed by those who don't deserve it.

This even discourages someone who wants to start creating bots.

But don't be afraid to post your bots, even if they don't reach the first pages of trending, there will always be someone to appreciate your work.

Well, if you want to follow me, know that the next bots probably won't be fake-ntr or netorare related for a while.

UPDATE: I added a second intro where you're at a resort with Jane using the money from the video.
creator: Lelouch_Vi_Britannia
